steps.name: oci-runtime-topology-contract
steps.summary: Documented local-first and OCI runtime topology for Nginx, web, worker, PostgreSQL + pgvector, Redis, networks, secret boundaries, and Kubernetes-ready mapping.

steps.name: compose-service-boundary
steps.summary: Added Next.js standalone Dockerfile, Compose services, private app/data networks, persistent data volumes, and placeholder-only deploy/env.dev for local validation.

steps.name: nginx-tls-security-boundary
steps.summary: Added local Nginx reverse proxy config with fixed upstream proxying, trusted IP forwarding headers, baseline security headers, admin/internal blocking, static asset cache headers, and documented production TLS boundaries.

steps.name: backup-restore-runbook
steps.summary: Added a PostgreSQL logical dump backup/restore runbook with local/test restore rehearsal, pgvector extension, migration-version, content_hash, public smoke, retention, and secret-handling checks.

steps.name: deploy-smoke-rollback-runbook
steps.summary: Added a deploy smoke and rollback runbook covering local/OCI Compose checks, public/private route smoke, phase-gated sitemap/feed/llms checks, migration rollback gate, and approval-only production rollback.
